programmes.show_description: The holidaymakers are arriving at the parks in their droves. In Cornwall, head of entertainment Matt decides to pit the guests against each other in a grand talent contest.
Tencreek Holiday Park in Cornwall struggles with high bookings, with every pitch practically overflowing with visitors; Crealy Theme Park and Resort in East Devon suffers as well.
Former Royal Marine Arthur Williams walks across Britain to learn about World War II, and he begins his adventure in the port city of Liverpool.

While in New York, Jessica helps out a struggling band, but things become complicated when the bassist's sister is implicated in the murder of a local extortionist.
A charity rock concert organised to save Maine Woods from developers is threatened when a singer is murdered. Can Jessica and the Sheriff catch the killer and salvage the event?
Jessica's friend Erin is haunted by being kidnapped as a child, and when Erin reads a novel with a story too close for coincidence, Jessica makes a shocking revelation.
On a trip to Hollywood, Jessica investigates when the producer of a hit TV comedy series is murdered just before she announces which of the show's lead characters is to be killed off.
After Jessica's short story for children becomes a television puppet show, she must find the fiend who used one of the puppets as a murder weapon.
Jessica Fletcher tackles a mystery while on holiday at a friend's ranch when a surly visitor, who threatened to reveal some scandalous information about her friend, is found dead.
Jessica has to solve two murders to clear the name of her old friend Deputy Andy Broom, who becomes a suspect when a murder weapon is found in his car.
Jessica travels to Australia to prove that she is the rightful heir to 130,000 acres of grazing land, but her arrival results in two murders.
A beautiful young woman becomes skipper of her father's racing yacht, but when her racing rival is found murdered, Jessica must try to solve the case.
Johnny is engaged to Seth's niece Amy. When he becomes the victim of a motorcycle accident, Amy insists that it was murder.
Uncovering an extraordinary building with a bright, decorative exterior built for a gruesome purpose, and a small underground facility with a chilling Cold War past.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: American bombers target a Romanian oil refinery in a grueling 13-hour mission in 1943.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: Allies face resistance at German defensive positions along the Gustav line as they push into Italy. One of these locations is the ancient monastery, Monte Cassino.

programmes.show_name: Battle of Britain: 3 Days that Saved the Nation
programmes.show_description: Dan Snow and Kate Humble relive three days which changed the course of history. The 15th August 1940, the day when the Battle of Britain started in earnest.  (Ep 1/3)

programmes.show_name: Battle of Britain: The Longest Day
programmes.show_description: Dan Snow and Kate Humble relive three days which changed history. The 30th August 1940 - the RAF and Fighter Command experience the most intense day of fighting. (Ep 2/3)

programmes.show_name: Battle of Britain: Our Finest Hour
programmes.show_description: Three days which changed the course of history. The 15th September 1940 - Battle of Britain day, when the RAF fought to stop Hitler's plans to invade Britain. (Ep 3/3)
Drama series. Vera and Ferguson battle for control of the prison using Bea and Kaz as pawns. Bea forces the women to vote on whether they still want a top dog.
Graphic drama series. Ferguson puts her plan to kill Bea into action. Liz learns that Sonia is probably a serial killer. Maxine leaves for a double mastectomy.
Drama series. Bea's vitrolic condemnation of her when she attempts to apologise stings Kaz into lying about Allie's part in the murder plot.
Graphic Australian drama series. Bea realises that Allie has fallen back into addiction. Franky meets with Jianna's son in an attempt to thwart Ferguson.

Learn more about the story behind the rusting carcass of ship, mysteriously still upright decades after its desertion, and a network of concrete channels hidden in a mountaintop forest.
The episode explores the towering remains of a mountainside structure with an explosive past, and a former top-secret Soviet facility still shrouded in mystery off the coast of Estonia.
The story behind a destroyed cliff-top ruin in a cratered landscape that helped turn the tide of war, and a concrete structure out at sea that came to a terrible end.

Detective drama starring Peter Falk and Eddie Albert. The trenchcoat-wearing sleuth investigates when the nation's leading war hero appears to be guilty of murder. (1971)
Crime mystery starring Peter Falk and Jose Ferrer. The police lieutenant investigates the murder of a scientist who had uncovered professional espionage. (1974)

programmes.show_name: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder
programmes.show_description: A psychologist's wife suddenly dies in a horrible accident and his best friend, a doctor, also dies under similar circumstances, involving his two dogs. (1978)
Crime drama starring Peter Falk and Roddy McDowall. A smokescreen of lies hinders Columbo's investigation when a businessman and his chauffeur are murdered. (1972)
Detective drama starring Peter Falk and Jack Cassidy. Lt Columbo is drawn into a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse with a murderous mystery writer. (1971)

programmes.show_name: The Most Embarrassing Live TV Moments
programmes.show_description: In this selection, featured moments include a cock up on a live episode of EastEnders, a link to LA with One Direction that goes pear-shaped, and Mr Blobby's head comes off.
A research scientist is murdered by an unknown assailant but it soon becomes clear that she is a victim of a serial rapist - 'The Mechanic'. Taggart and Jardine investigate.
